untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (higher TF vs lower TF confluence), specific consolidation pattern validation, and exhaustion/divergence detection that cannot be fully expressed with single-timeframe indicators. Requires dynamic cross-timeframe comparison logic not available in the indicator set. '[THRESHOLD_NEEDED]' parameter values are undefined in source material.
translation_notes: Approximated using: (1) ADX for trend strength/establishment, (2) Bollinger Bandwidth for consolidation quality, (3) MACD histogram for momentum persistence and directional alignment, (4) RSI for exhaustion signals. This represents a lower-timeframe validation proxy but does not capture the core multi-timeframe structure analysis requirement.
